positive: A hyper-detailed, graphic design illustration of a celestial forest scene. The main subject is a stylized, ancient glowing tree with luminous roots, surrounded by abstract constellations and floating nebula gas. The style is neo-geometric fantasy with strong line art influences, reminiscent of Ukiyo-e woodcuts mixed with modern bioluminescence. Composition should be centrally focused, designed for seamless tiling or apparel printing, featuring deep indigos, cosmic purples, emerald greens, and pops of radiant gold. Use thick, clean outlines and a distinct silhouette against a gradient dark background. Minimalistic but impactful. Vector style, high contrast, excellent print resolution.
